settings.title: We Are Now Open Saturday Mornings
settings.excerpt: Starting in February you can book cleanings and checkups on the first and third Saturday of each month.
settings.body:
We heard the same thing from a lot of you: weekday appointments are hard to fit around work and school runs. So we are opening the Brightside chairs on the first and third Saturday of every month, from 8am to 1pm.

The change starts in February, and we will keep it going as long as the slots keep filling. So far the demand suggests they will.

What you can book on a Saturday

Hygiene visits, checkups, and most fillings can all be booked in these slots. More involved treatment we will still schedule on weekdays when our full team is in and we have the time to do it properly.

To give you a quick sense of what fits:

  • Routine cleanings and scale and polish.
  • Checkups, including for children.
  • Straightforward fillings and small repairs.

If you are not sure whether your treatment suits a Saturday slot, just ask when you call and we will tell you honestly.

Booking ahead pays off

The early dates fill quickly, so it is worth booking your next cleaning ahead rather than waiting for the reminder card. A good habit is to book the next appointment as you leave this one.

We are glad to finally offer this. For a lot of families it removes the one reason a checkup kept slipping down the list.
